data.2025-08-18T14:27:09.205Zvjv2ggy: The sample database is structured as a tree to allow complete flexibility in the types of process flows that can be logged. Every entry is a Node its content is defined by a Template. Nodes can be freely moved up and down or across the tree hierarchy to represent correctly the flow of operations. Each template contains specific fields which may be the parameters of a process, images or files, text, tables, graphs... The example groups samples by location but they can be organized however it seems convenient, templates can be added and improved for specific use cases.

Clone nodes are used in the example with two purposes: 1. A single process acting on multiple samples: node://mn5yb466-ai0x2tkmj 2. A dice, being at the same time a descendant of a sample and a sample per se: node://mn5yb467-t7n3alev4 Usage of clones in this way is strongly encouraged.
Note like this one can be used for comments, warnings, adding pictures or files, make checklists...

nodes.name: Resist removal AZ Kwik Strip 2 h 70 °C
